_comment: Sprint 6b perf budget (v2). All values are UNCOMPRESSED bytes. Cloudflare free tier Worker limit = 3 MiB, paid = 10 MiB. Chunks over 1 MiB get flagged; if you need more, justify it. 2026-06-21: raised from 320 KB / 4 MiB after audit — current build has 1× 853 KB main (TanStack router + React + query), plus 3rd-party lazy chunks (jspdf 377 KB, chart 351 KB). Plan: code-split the main bundle in Sprint 7.
